content_body: We had two families (total 10 people) and all stayed comfortably at Cadence Ridge. We were close to what we wanted to do - zip-lining, whitewater rafting, tubing and boating on Lake Blue Ridge. We loved cooking in the huge kitchen! The view from the back deck is stunning. We appreciated the fine finishes of the home - luxury beds and linens - leather sofas, etc. With 4 adults and 6 children, we had plenty of room and privacy. Thanks for a great vacation!
title: "Thanks for a great vacation!"
